entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop studied for heterosis

entities.name: TOPCROSS HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrids produced by crossing diverse landraces and open-pollinating varieties on male-sterile lines

entities.name: LANDRACES
entities.description: Locally adapted traditional varieties used as parents in breeding

entities.name: OPEN-POLLINATING VARIETIES
entities.description: High yielding varieties used as parents in breeding

entities.name: HOMOZYGOUS MALE-STERILE LINES
entities.description: Lines used as female parents in the topcross breeding process

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the hybrids and pollinators were grown

entities.name: GENETIC COMPONENTS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: Statistical method used to quantify differences among hybrids

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The superior performance of hybrids compared to their parents

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: EARLINESS
entities.description: The speed of maturity or flowering of the plant

entities.name: BIOMASS YIELD
entities.description: The total biological yield of the plant

entities.name: STRAW YIELD
entities.description: The yield of the non-grain portion of the plant

entities.name: TIME TO FLOWERING
entities.description: The duration from planting to the onset of flowering

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Water stress occurring at the end of the growing season

entities.name: MALE-STERILE LINE 843A
entities.description: A specific early maturing male-sterile line used in the study

entities.name: BIOMASS YIELD PER DAY
entities.description: The rate of biomass accumulation per day

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENETIC EFFECTS
entities.description: The cumulative effect of individual alleles on a trait
